{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/28887894?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/qifan-sailboat", "id": 28887894, "login": "qifan-sailboat", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI4ODg3ODk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/qifan-sailboat", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-407", "name": "Inefficient Algorithmic Complexity"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "During message encoding, `hickory-proto`'s `BinEncoder` stores pointers to labels that are candidates for name compression in a `Vec<(usize, Vec<u8>)>`. The name compression logic then searches for matches with a linear scan.

A malicious message with many records can both introduce many candidate labels, and invoke this linear scan many times. This can amplify CPU exhaustion in DoS attacks.

This is similar to [CVE-2024-8508](https://www.nlnetlabs.nl/downloads/unbound/CVE-2024-8508.txt).

### Reporter

Qifan Zhang, Palo Alto Networks", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q2qq-hmj6-3wpp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T02:59:48Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q2qq-hmj6-3wpp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q2qq-hmj6-3wpp"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-07T02:59:48Z", "references": ["https://github.com/hickory-dns/hickory-dns/security/advisories/GHSA-q2qq-hmj6-3wpp", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0119.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q2qq-hmj6-3wpp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/hickory-dns/hickory-dns/security-advisories/GHSA-q2qq-hmj6-3wpp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/hickory-dns/hickory-dns", "summary": "hickory-proto vulnerable to CPU exhaustion during message encoding due to O(n²) name compression", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-07T02:59:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q2qq-hmj6-3wpp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.26.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "hickory-proto"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.3.1, <= 0.26.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: hickory-proto vulnerable to CPU exhaustion during message encoding due to O(n²) name compression
